title: n8n site unreachable due to IP block
symptom: When trying to access n8n via the manage app link, the user sees 'This site can’t be reached'. This occurs after a period of successful access.
applies_when: Previously able to access n8n without issues
not_this_if: Accessing n8n from a different network or IP address
root_cause: The user's IP address was blocked by Hostinger, preventing access to the n8n instance. This can happen due to security measures or perceived suspicious activity.
fix_steps: Contact Hostinger support to check if your IP is blocked
Request unblocking of your IP address
If prompted, create a new account or reconnect to your original data as needed
agent_instruction: Check with Hostinger support to ensure your IP is not blocked and follow their instructions to regain access.
